title: Language Teaching Application and Research Center - About the Program
content:
Language Teaching Application and Research Center - About the Program

At Istanbul Esenyurt University Language Teaching Application and Research Center, the "Common European Framework of Reference for Languages" (CEFR) is used as the basis for teaching Turkish as a foreign language. Many methods and techniques used in teaching Turkish as a foreign language are applied in the lessons. Knowledge and skills are presented through various techniques and methods using visual, auditory, and written educational tools.

LANGUAGE LEVELS

Our courses are organized according to the language levels defined in the Common European Framework of Reference for Languages.
